goal: Fix the duplicate-looking card art for jianai4, jianai5, and jianai6 so these three 兼采楼 cards no longer show the same image in the showcase.
constraints: Do not change card ids, names, costs, rarity, or gameplay data.
Prefer local asset relinking or safe non-destructive bitmap replacement over large UI refactors.
Keep current card art loading/fallback logic intact unless a mapping fix is required.
Do not touch unrelated story, menu, or community files.
deliverables: Identify why jianai4, jianai5, and jianai6 currently render the same artwork.
Make the three cards display distinct images in showcase views.
Document the asset/source decision in a short audit note.
